meta.northy_message: Midland ISD changed the math — $75K at full price, pipeline at ~$175K. ESC 10 is tomorrow. Two gates still unconfirmed: RAM dump status and ESC 16 exclusivity. Heather was today — hold both rooms. Don't let the thermostat show up the night before a big meeting.

act_now.title: ESC 10 Deck + Mabel Demo — TOMORROW
act_now.detail: Tuesday June 23 meeting with ESC 10 (Angela). Two critical-path gates: RAM data dump status and ESC 16 exclusivity answer. Neither confirmed resolved as of tonight. Midland ISD $75K PO = social proof for deck.
act_now.action: Confirm RAM dump landed. Confirm ESC 16 agreement reviewed. Finalize 5-7 slides + Mabel demo. Add Midland ISD as proof point.

act_now.title: ESC 16 Exclusivity — Still Unanswered
act_now.detail: Does ESC 16 agreement contain exclusivity clause? Nobody pulled it as of 11:45am. Gates entire ESC 10 regional carve-out strategy.
act_now.action: Find agreement tonight or first thing tomorrow. Read exclusivity clause. Check exit language. Do not walk into ESC 10 without this answer.

think_about.title: Midland ISD $75K PO — Pipeline at ~$175K
think_about.detail: $75K full-price purchase order. Pipeline jumped from ~$100K to ~$175K. September gap narrowed to ~$25K.

think_about.title: Patrick Reid Equity Cliff — 22 Days
think_about.detail: July 15 deadline. Board consent must be signed. Patrick out this week.

intel.title: Senses & Reflexes — Integration Architecture for GBrain
intel.pattern: Recipe format (YAML + markdown). Senses = data inputs. Reflexes = brain state-change triggers. 'Agents ARE the runtime' — recipes ARE the installer.
intel.applies_to: Hermes skill ecosystem — formalizes what Northy does as shareable recipes

intel.title: Two-Stage LLM Pipeline — Propose then Critique
intel.pattern: Stage 1 proposes clusters. Stage 2 critiques/corrects. Dynamic schemas per chunk enforce completeness. Precision-first.
intel.applies_to: Mabel book intelligence / district benchmarking pipeline

intel.title: Skillify — Meta-Extraction Pattern
intel.pattern: 100+ skills. One command extracts repeatable workflows into reusable skills.
